error_snippets: PR_TITLE: feat(compressor): 支持rope_sin/rope_cos输入为float类型
PR title must contain one of the following prefixes: [BugFix], [Performance], [Test], [CI], [Feature], [Doc], [Misc], [Community], [Refactor]
Example: '[Feature] Add new optimization pass' or 'Add new feature [Feature]'
Error: failed to run script step: Error: command terminated with non-zero exit code: command terminated with exit code 1
analyses.root_cause: The PR title uses conventional commit format 'feat(compressor): ...' instead of the project's required bracket-prefix format. The validate-pr-title CI check requires bracket tags like [Feature], [BugFix], [CI], etc., and the conventional commit 'feat:' prefix does not match any of the allowed bracket patterns.
fix_suggestions: Change the PR title to use a bracket prefix, e.g. '[Feature][Compressor] Support rope_sin/rope_cos float input type' or 'Support rope_sin/rope_cos float input type [Feature]'
Alternatively, update the validate-pr-title regex in _pre_commit.yml to also accept conventional commit prefixes like 'feat:', 'fix:', etc. if the project wants to support both formats
